title: Apollo Pharmacy is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Pharmacy is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!
